roa.docketEntryComment: Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 09/28/21 FTA HEARING, 3RD BW

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X:LOVE WAIVER,/OR/X:DEFENDANT FOUND SUITABLE FOR THE COMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 575 POLK ST ON 04-09-21 FOR EVALUATION & ASSESSMENT AT 1:30 PM/CONTD:EVALUAITON &ASSESSMENT/DOPC/
/CAL:PRE PLEA PRG RPT/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE BEGERT APPEARING VIA ZOOM//FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:1,000/BWNUM:2ND/X: 4 OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THISDATE/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT-RETURN/INTC/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED WITHOUT ANY FINDING OF CONTEMPT/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ABIDE BYTHE STAY AWAY ORDER PREVIOUSLY FILED FROM GOLDEN GATE & LARKIN IN SF EXCEPTTHAT HE CAN WALK THROUGH THE AREA TO ATTEND CJC AT 575 POLK ST,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DATE OF 09-22-20 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:PHC/STWPX/INTC/X:STAY AWAY ORDER ORALLY MODIFIED TO ALLOW DEFENDANTTO ATTEND CJC NEAR POLK ST/X:ACM ORDER MODIFIED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO CALLBY PHONE 4X A WEEK/CTORD: THIS CASE IS REFERRED TO CJC FOR ASSESSMENT/TRANS POLK: FOR CJC ASSESSMENT ON DATE AT 1:30 P,M,/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:10-06-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:GOLDEN GATE & LARKIN/DEF:MAY WALK THROUGH THE AREA TO ATTEND COURT AT CJC 575 POLK ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA ONLY/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRE PLEA PRG RPT/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:1,000/BWNUM:3RD/X: 4 OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:PRE PLEA PRG RPT/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE SING APPEARING VIA ZOOM/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/INTC/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PRE PLEA PRG RPT/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/INTC/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGESING APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONT/DOP/
